more.title: The precedent has been set – if a president performs well or needs more time he gets a term extension
more.description: In 2013, millions of Zimbabweans stood in long queues to vote for a new charter, one that was intended to be the ultimate shield against the “strongman” politics that had characterized our first three decades of independence. If you value my social justice advocacy and writing, please consider a financial contribution to keep it going.
